meaning: n.核武器,核能发电厂,核潜艇vt.以核武器攻击v.以核子武器攻击,以核武器摧毁
examples: Why did you start to write Nuke?
The argument to parallel-nuke is a pattern.
Parallel-nuke kills processes on multiple remote hosts in parallel.
There are scores of nations that could develop a nuke if they wanted to.
So for a taste of the Jetsons life, grab a 1960s style frozen dinner and nuke it.
